checks_reviewed.evidence: This review is scoped to a proposed update plan only. The plan correctly schedules these commands after implementation at .evidence/reviews/20260613-codex-cli-role-skill-analysis/design-md-and-codex-plan-reinforcement-update-plan.md:318-327.
Plan changes are analysis/evidence markdown only and do not modify mobile UI/runtime. AGENTS.md:110 makes mobile-mcp applicable to mobile UI/runtime changes with an available simulator or device.

residual_risks: This GO applies only to the proposed update plan, not to the future implemented markdown changes.
Future implementation must still run the planned content scans, evidence gates, final reviewer, scoped git diff, and git status before final completion reporting.
Live Stitch project continuity cannot be proven by local documentation alone; the plan correctly keeps that as a non-goal for this update.
